line_description: A long horizontal axis line spanning the full width (~640px) with two double-slash markers ('//') at the top-left and top-right ends, and three short vertical punctum strokes descending below the line at roughly equal intervals (left, middle, right).

unmatched_vision_glyphs.description: Two parallel diagonal slashes ('//') at the top-left, oriented NE-SW, acting as an axis terminator / section marker above the horizontal line.
Two parallel diagonal slashes ('//') at the top-right, oriented NE-SW, mirroring the left terminator above the horizontal line.
Short vertical stroke (tally-like punctum) below the horizontal line, near the left end of the axis.
Short vertical stroke (tally-like punctum) below the horizontal line, near the horizontal midpoint of the axis.
Short vertical stroke (tally-like punctum) below the horizontal line, near the right end of the axis.

graphics.description: Single solid horizontal line spanning the full line width, acting as a number-line / magic-cube axis on which the other elements are placed.
